summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of Interview Practice Platform. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working including landing page, login/logout, dashboard, role-based interview setup, interview history, interview review, profile, contact, and feedback pages.

backend: GET /api/auth/me - with token returns user data (200)
POST /api/interviews/start - creates role-based interview with AI questions (200)
POST /api/interviews/{id}/complete - generates AI feedback and summary (200)
frontend: Landing page loads with hero section, features, testimonials carousel, CTA, footer
Landing page has 6 feature cards and 8+ testimonial cards
Login page has email input, password input, submit button, forgot password link, signup link
Login with test@interviewmaster.com / Test@123 redirects to dashboard
Login with invalid credentials shows 'Invalid credentials' error toast
Dashboard shows stats (Total Interviews, Completed, In Progress, Questions Answered)
Dashboard shows Role-Based and Resume-Based interview options
Dashboard shows recent interviews with Continue/Review/Done badges
Role setup page has 4-step flow: Role -> Level -> Skills -> Configure
Role setup shows 6 role cards (Frontend, Backend, Full Stack, Data Analyst, DevOps, HR)
Role setup shows 3 experience levels (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced)
Role setup shows skill selection with 2-8 skill requirement
Role setup shows interview preview summary before starting
Starting interview navigates to Live Interview page with fullscreen gate
Interview History page shows all interviews with filter dropdown
Interview History shows Continue/Review buttons based on status
Interview Review page shows Performance Summary, Questions, Transcripts, AI Feedback
Interview Review has 'Send to Email' button
Profile page shows user info (name, email, member since, stats)
Profile page has change picture button and change email button
Contact page has form with name, email, subject, message fields
Feedback page has 5-star rating and feedback text area
Navbar has Dashboard, History, Profile links when logged in
Navbar has user menu with Profile, History, Logout options
Logout clears session and redirects to login page

critical_code_review_comments: All APIs are working correctly with proper authentication
AI integration (Gemini) generates questions and feedback successfully
OTP email sending works via SMTP
All CRUD operations for interviews work correctly
Frontend properly handles auth state and protected routes
seed_data_creation: Test user was pre-seeded by main agent with bcrypt password hash
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 completed full E2E testing after DB wipe. Test user: test@interviewmaster.com / Test@123. All backend APIs working (auth, interviews, profile, contact, feedback, recordings). All frontend pages working (landing, login, signup, dashboard, role setup, live interview, interview review, history, profile, contact, feedback). AI integration (Gemini) generates questions and feedback. Whisper transcription runs async. Live interview requires fullscreen mode and webcam/mic access (cannot be fully tested in headless browser). The interview complete endpoint may take 10-20s due to multiple Gemini API calls.

contact_feedback.contact: Sends email to admin and user
contact_feedback.feedback: Saves to DB, appears in testimonials
